_comment: Payment lifecycle. Placement: db row, single writer per payment id. Created by the consumed request event (creation is not a transition; redelivery is deduped by Payment.orderId). Publishes markPaid/markDeclined via transition actions.

_ignores.request: creation event; at-least-once redelivery deduped by Payment.orderId

_ignores.capture: payment-single-capture: already captured; redelivery deduped by Payment.id
